title: GPTQ: Accurate Post-Training Quantization for Generative Pre-trained Transformers
authors: Elias Frantar; Saleh Ashkboos; Torsten Hoefler; Dan Alistarh
venue_or_status: ICLR 2023; accepted OpenReview paper is titled OPTQ
encoder_optimization: Calibration activations form a layerwise Hessian proxy; no model backpropagation or parameter learning.
exported_or_runtime_state: Quantized codes; scales/zero-points; grouping and ordering metadata; unquantized exceptions.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width and compression/memory claims; no deployable output-file byte enumeration including metadata and alignment was found.
comparison_limitations: Direct only after matching model, calibration tokens, group rules, tensor scope, physical serializer, and evaluation; no paper number is imported as our measurement.

title: SparseGPT: Massive Language Models Can Be Accurately Pruned in One-Shot
authors: Elias Frantar; Dan Alistarh
encoder_optimization: Calibration activations form a second-order layer reconstruction problem; dense base is not retrained.
exported_or_runtime_state: Surviving values; support representation or N:M layout; block and dense-exception metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Sparsity and runtime/compression claims; no byte-exact deployable sparse file including support metadata was found.
comparison_limitations: Sparse storage and kernel assumptions can dominate the rate; compare only with identical structure, eligible tensors, serializer, and evaluation.

title: A Simple and Effective Pruning Approach for Large Language Models
authors: Mingjie Sun; Zhuang Liu; Anna Bair; J. Zico Kolter
encoder_optimization: Weight-times-activation magnitude scores; the paper states no retraining or weight update.
exported_or_runtime_state: Surviving values and either explicit support/mask data or an N:M layout; dense exceptions.
reported_rate_evidence: Sparsity and accuracy are reported; no physical sparse artifact byte count including support was found.
comparison_limitations: Do not treat logical zeros as free bytes; support encoding, tensor exclusions, kernels, calibration, and evaluation must match.

title: AWQ: Activation-aware Weight Quantization for On-Device LLM Compression and Acceleration
authors: Ji Lin; Jiaming Tang; Haotian Tang; Shang Yang; Wei-Ming Chen; Wei-Chen Wang; Guangxuan Xiao; Xingyu Dang; Chuang Gan; Song Han
encoder_optimization: Activation statistics guide scale and clipping search; the accepted paper explicitly says no backpropagation or reconstruction.
exported_or_runtime_state: Packed codes; group scales/zero-points; any non-folded channel scales; exclusions and kernel metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width, speedup, and memory claims; no byte-exact serialized artifact with scale/header/alignment overhead was found.
comparison_limitations: Closest scale-protection control, but direct comparison requires matched folding audit, group size, tensor coverage, physical bytes, and evaluation.

title: SpQR: A Sparse-Quantized Representation for Near-Lossless LLM Weight Compression
authors: Tim Dettmers; Ruslan Svirschevski; Vage Egiazarian; Denis Kuznedelev; Elias Frantar; Saleh Ashkboos; Alexander Borzunov; Torsten Hoefler; Dan Alistarh
encoder_optimization: Calibration-based second-order sensitivity separates high-precision outliers; no dense-model training.
exported_or_runtime_state: Quantized bulk codes/scales; sparse outlier values and indices; permutations and format metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Average bits per parameter, GPU memory, and compression factors are reported; no complete output-file byte enumeration was found.
comparison_limitations: Closest heterogeneous Q+S payload, but outlier policy, index format, permutations, tensor scope, physical bytes, kernels, and evaluation must match.

title: SqueezeLLM: Dense-and-Sparse Quantization
authors: Sehoon Kim; Coleman Richard Charles Hooper; Amir Gholami; Zhen Dong; Xiuyu Li; Sheng Shen; Michael W. Mahoney; Kurt Keutzer
encoder_optimization: The main sensitivity path computes squared loss gradients/Fisher weights before sensitivity-weighted clustering; the dense base is not globally fine-tuned.
exported_or_runtime_state: Non-uniform indices and codebooks; dense/sparse outlier values and indices; scale and format metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Memory requirement, precision, and speed are reported; no complete serialized file byte count including codebooks and sparse indices was found.
comparison_limitations: Keep in a backward-assisted track; match gradient corpus/budget, codebooks, sparse payload, model/tensors, physical bytes, and evaluation.

title: LQER: Low-Rank Quantization Error Reconstruction for LLMs
authors: Cheng Zhang; Jianyi Cheng; George Anthony Constantinides; Yiren Zhao
encoder_optimization: Activation-induced scaling and truncated low-rank decomposition; no gradient-based iterative optimization.
exported_or_runtime_state: Base quantized weights plus high-precision low-rank factors and their scale/layout metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit configuration and hardware-resource comparisons are reported; no byte-exact model artifact including factors and metadata was found.
comparison_limitations: Match W/A scope, rank, factor precision, base quantizer, tensor coverage, factor bytes, kernels, and evaluation.

title: QERA: An Analytical Framework for Quantization Error Reconstruction
authors: Cheng Zhang; Jeffrey T. H. Wong; Can Xiao; George Anthony Constantinides; Yiren Zhao
encoder_optimization: Closed-form activation-aware low-rank reconstruction for the inference/PTQ path; QPEFT experiments are outside this row.
exported_or_runtime_state: Base quantized weights plus low-rank factors and scale/layout metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width and rank-based accuracy results are reported; no complete serialized artifact byte count was found.
comparison_limitations: Use only inference/PTQ cells in the frozen track; QPEFT numbers require a fine-tuned track. Match factor precision/rank and all physical bytes.

title: EoRA: Fine-tuning-free Compensation for Compressed LLM with Eigenspace Low-Rank Approximation
authors: Shih-Yang Liu; Maksim Khadkevich; Nai Chit Fung; Charbel Sakr; Chao-Han Huck Yang; Chien-Yi Wang; Saurav Muralidharan; Hongxu Yin; Kwang-Ting Cheng; Jan Kautz; Yu-Chiang Frank Wang; Pavlo Molchanov; Min-Hung Chen
encoder_optimization: Activation-sensitive eigenspace approximation constructs compensation without fine-tuning.
exported_or_runtime_state: Underlying compressed model plus EoRA low-rank matrices; optional quantized compensation and kernel metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Rank, memory/compute overhead, and task recovery are reported; no complete deployable serialized file byte count was found.
comparison_limitations: Task-specific compensation and base compressor vary; match task/calibration, rank/precision, base payload, physical bytes, kernels, and evaluation.

variant: one-shot quantization plus 2:4 sparsity and low-rank compensation
title: SLiM: One-shot Quantization and Sparsity with Low-rank Approximation for LLM Weight Compression
authors: Mohammad Mozaffari; Amir Yazdanbakhsh; Maryam Mehri Dehnavi
encoder_optimization: One-shot probabilistic quantization, semi-structured pruning, and analytical low-rank compensation; optional PEFT is excluded.
exported_or_runtime_state: Quantized values/scales; 2:4 layout or support descriptors; low-rank factors; format metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width, 2:4 sparsity, rank, memory reduction, and speed are reported; no complete serialized file byte enumeration was found.
comparison_limitations: Closest Q+S+L family, but compare the one-shot core only unless PEFT is a separate track; match rank, factor precision, sparse layout, bytes, kernels, and evaluation.

title: GuidedQuant: Large Language Model Quantization via Exploiting End Loss Guidance
authors: Jinuk Kim; Marwa El Halabi; Wonpyo Park; Clemens JS Schaefer; Deokjae Lee; Yeonhong Park; Jae W. Lee; Hyun Oh Song
encoder_optimization: A backward pass supplies end-loss gradients/Fisher blocks; quantization then proceeds without retraining the dense model.
exported_or_runtime_state: The selected base quantizer payload; gradient/Fisher statistics are encoder-only and not deployed.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width, accuracy, and quantizer-specific results are reported; no complete serialized artifact byte count was found.
comparison_limitations: Keep separate from no-backward PTQ; match backward corpus/budget, attached base quantizer, tensor scope, physical bytes, and evaluation.

variant: fused channel scales and rank-4 low-rank auxiliary repair
title: SliderQuant: Accurate Post-Training Quantization for LLMs
authors: Shigeng Wang; Chao Li; Yangyuxuan Kang; Jiawei Fan; Zhonghong Ou; Anbang Yao
encoder_optimization: AdamW optimizes local sliding-window reconstruction with learnable channel scales and rank-4 low-rank auxiliary state while the dense pretrained base remains the reference.
exported_or_runtime_state: Exported codes/scales/zero-points; any scale or low-rank state not proven merged; scheme/group descriptors; padding, headers, and alignment.
reported_rate_evidence: The source reports bit-width configurations and model metrics; no complete deployable output-file byte enumeration was found.
comparison_limitations: Close scale-plus-low-rank B-track comparator; match calibration samples/tokens, epoch budget, W-only versus W/A scope, merged-state proof, actual bytes, compute, and evaluation.

title: First-Order Error Matters: Accurate Compensation for Quantized Large Language Models
authors: Xingyu Zheng; Haotong Qin; Yuye Li; Haoran Chu; Jiakai Wang; Jinyang Guo; Michele Magno; Xianglong Liu
encoder_optimization: Approximates the first-order term from latent/full-precision weight differences and avoids backpropagation-based gradients.
exported_or_runtime_state: Base quantized codes/scales after compensation; any surviving transform or exception metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width and accuracy/latency comparisons are reported; no byte-exact serialized artifact was found.
comparison_limitations: Relevant to our nonzero linear loss term; match the base quantizer, compensation order, tensor scope, physical bytes, and evaluation.

title: Model-Preserving Adaptive Rounding
authors: Albert Tseng; Zhaofeng Sun; Christopher De Sa
encoder_optimization: Full-model KL Hessian sketches use Hessian-vector products/backward passes; rounding itself performs no gradient learning. Recovery fine-tuning results are excluded.
exported_or_runtime_state: Chosen quantizer codes/scales and incoherence metadata; Hessian sketches are encoder-only.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width and quantizer rate are reported; no complete serialized output-file byte enumeration was found.
comparison_limitations: Match Hessian sketch variant, backward tokens/GPU-hours, quantizer, rotations, physical bytes, and evaluation; optional recovery fine-tuning belongs in a separate track.

title: Radio: Rate-Distortion Optimization for Large Language Model Compression
authors: Sean I. Young
encoder_optimization: Post-training rate-distortion allocation/quantization with the pretrained model fixed.
exported_or_runtime_state: Quantized representation plus per-layer rate/allocation and decoder metadata required by the implementation.
reported_rate_evidence: Target model size and rate-distortion budgets are reported, but no complete actual output-file byte enumeration including decoder metadata was found.
comparison_limitations: A natural rate-allocation comparator, but its rate definition must be converted through the same physical serializer before direct ranking.

variant: fractional-bit quantizer palette and mixed-scheme allocation
title: Q-Palette: Fractional-Bit Quantizers Toward Optimal Bit Allocation for Efficient LLM Deployment
authors: Deokjae Lee; Hyun Oh Song
encoder_optimization: Data-free codec selection and a data-aware Hessian/perplexity-guided mode are both frozen PTQ; neither retrains model parameters.
exported_or_runtime_state: Quantized codes; trellis/vector/scalar codebooks; per-layer scheme and fusion decisions; scales and decoder metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: The paper's constraint uses average bits per weight and a memory budget in bits; no byte-exact serialized artifact including codebooks/metadata was found.
comparison_limitations: Report data-free and data-aware modes separately when needed; match quantizer set, calibration, codebooks, fusion, kernels, physical bytes, and evaluation.

title: LiftQuant: Continuous Bit-Width LLM via Dimensional Lifting and Projection
authors: Liulu He; XuanAng Liu; Juntao Liu; Taolue Feng; Ting Lu; Chunsheng Gan; Zhiyv Peng; Yuan Du; Huanrui Yang; Yijiang Liu; Li Du
encoder_optimization: Block-output reconstruction optimizes lifted/projection correction state with backward passes while the pretrained base is the reference.
exported_or_runtime_state: Lifted low-bit codes; projection/correction state; scales, layer descriptors, and any kernel padding/alignment.
reported_rate_evidence: Continuous logical bit-width and performance/speed are reported; no complete physical serialized artifact byte enumeration was found.
comparison_limitations: Mechanism-only B-track until a protocol-matched full reproduction exists; charge projection/correction state and do not mix optional end-to-end results.

title: LiftQuant: Continuous Bit-Width LLM via Dimensional Lifting and Projection
authors: Liulu He; XuanAng Liu; Juntao Liu; Taolue Feng; Ting Lu; Chunsheng Gan; Zhiyv Peng; Yuan Du; Huanrui Yang; Yijiang Liu; Li Du
encoder_optimization: Optional global causal-language-model recovery updates compression/correction state end to end.
exported_or_runtime_state: Final lifted low-bit model plus learned projection/correction state and all serializer metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Continuous logical bit-width and performance/speed are reported; no complete physical serialized artifact byte enumeration was found.
comparison_limitations: C-track only; disclose training data/tokens/steps/compute and exported state. Never rank its recovery result as frozen PTQ.

variant: locally and end-to-end learned function-preserving transforms
title: FPTQuant: Function-Preserving Transforms for LLM Quantization
authors: Boris van Breugel; Yelysei Bondarenko; Paul N. Whatmough; Markus Nagel
venue_or_status: ICML 2026 per the official ICML listing and current arXiv metadata; an older OpenReview listing says ICLR 2026
encoder_optimization: Function-preserving transforms are trained locally and end to end to match quantized and full-precision outputs.
exported_or_runtime_state: Transformed quantized weights; any non-mergeable dynamic scaling state/operations; quantization and layout metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: INT4 configuration, latency, and speedup are reported; no complete serialized output-file byte count was found.
comparison_limitations: Training-assisted W4A4 system track; match learned-transform training budget, W/A scope, mergeability, runtime ops, physical bytes, hardware, and evaluation.

title: Preserve-Then-Quantize: Balancing Rank Budgets for Quantization Error Reconstruction in LLMs
authors: Yoonjun Cho; Dongjae Jeon; Soeun Kim; Moongyu Jeon; Albert No
encoder_optimization: Theory-guided closed-form rank split preserves a dominant subspace before quantization and reconstructs the residual; QPEFT results are excluded.
exported_or_runtime_state: Base quantized weights plus preserved and residual low-rank factors and scale/layout metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width and rank-budget results are reported; no complete serialized artifact byte count including all factors was found.
comparison_limitations: Match total rank and factor precision, base quantizer, scaling, tensor scope, physical bytes, and evaluation; keep QPEFT cells in a fine-tuned track.

title: SERQ: Saliency-Aware Low-Rank Error Reconstruction for LLM Quantization
authors: Yeonsik Park; Hyeonseong Kim; Seungkyu Choi
encoder_optimization: Static activation flattening, saliency-aware decomposition, and offline permutation; no iterative model fine-tuning is described.
exported_or_runtime_state: Quantized weights/activations plus a single low-rank compensation matrix, scales, and permutation metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: W4A8/W4A4 configurations, rank, latency, and calibration complexity are reported; no complete serialized artifact byte count was found.
comparison_limitations: W4A4 scope differs from weight-only experiments; match W/A format, rank/precision, permutation payload, physical bytes, kernels, and evaluation.

title: Rethinking Residual Errors in Compensation-based LLM Quantization
authors: Shuaiting Li; Juncan Deng; Kedong Xu; Rongtao Deng; Hong Gu; Minghan Jiang; Haibin Shen; Kejie Huang
encoder_optimization: Closed-form/sequential compensation aligns to original full-precision outputs without global fine-tuning.
exported_or_runtime_state: Base quantized codes/scales plus any compensation state that is not absorbed into those codes; serializer metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit width and accuracy are reported; no byte-exact deployable artifact enumeration was found.
comparison_limitations: Match GPTQ/GPTAQ base, compensation order, calibration, tensor scope, surviving state, physical bytes, and evaluation.

title: Effective Interplay between Sparsity and Quantization: From Theory to Practice
authors: Simla Burcu Harma; Ayan Chakraborty; Elizaveta Kostenok; Danila Mishin; Dongho Ha; Babak Falsafi; Martin Jaggi; Ming Liu; Yunho Oh; Suvinay Subramanian; Amir Yazdanbakhsh
encoder_optimization: Deterministic magnitude sparsity and max-scaled encoding are analyzed without gradient training; order and compound error are explicit.
exported_or_runtime_state: Sparse quantized values; scale state; mask/index or N:M layout; ordering and container metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Sparsity/quantization error and hardware effects are reported; no full serialized endpoint audit was found.
comparison_limitations: Closest interaction-theory prior. Its transformation-level non-orthogonality differs from our signed local-PSD cross term; neither may be described as the first after this work. The author project page links the official implementation.

title: Optimal Brain Restoration for Joint Quantization and Sparsification of LLMs
authors: Hang Guo; Yawei Li; Luca Benini
encoder_optimization: A second-order surrogate yields closed-form group error compensation; compensation is folded and requantized rather than trained end to end.
exported_or_runtime_state: Final sparse low-bit weights; masks or N:M layout; scales/zero-points; any unfused rotation; grouping and container metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Equivalent bit width, memory and speed are reported; no complete serialized container audit was found.
comparison_limitations: Closest Hessian Q/S comparator. Match W/A/KV scope, sparsity, calibration, folded-state proof, physical sparse layout, kernels and evaluation.

title: Towards the Limit of Network Quantization
authors: Yoojin Choi; Mostafa El-Khamy; Jungwon Lee
encoder_optimization: Diagonal task-Hessian weighting drives k-means or entropy-constrained scalar quantization; optional fine-tuning is a separate intervention.
exported_or_runtime_state: Variable-length code stream; codebook or reconstruction LUT; code lengths/tree; tensor and container metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Compression ratios and component coding formulas are reported; no complete self-describing file with alignment/hash audit was found.
comparison_limitations: Historical non-LLM scope but decisive novelty prior: Hessian plus rate/entropy coding is not new.

title: Optimal Formats for Weight Quantisation
authors: Douglas Orr; Luka Ribar; Carlo Luschi
encoder_optimization: Distributional format analysis is data-free; the Fisher cross-layer allocation path uses loss-sensitivity statistics and is kept in the backward-assisted lane.
exported_or_runtime_state: Actual variable-length streams; symbol/code tables; per-tensor format allocation; scales and container metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Average/sample code length and Huffman/bzip2 experiments are reported; no complete model artifact byte audit was found.
comparison_limitations: Match the entropy coder and Fisher computation budget. This is a direct precedent for format-aware and Fisher-aware rate allocation.

variant: orthogonal projection for quantization plus low-rank adapters
title: ProjQ: Project-and-Quantize for Adapter-Aware LLM Compression
authors: Wenya Yu; Chao Zhang; Li Wang; Samson Lasaulce; Merouane Debbah
encoder_optimization: Alternating orthogonal projection shapes quantization error toward the low-rank adapter subspace; main experiments include downstream adaptation.
exported_or_runtime_state: Base codec; both low-rank factors; any non-folded projection state; adapter and container metadata.
reported_rate_evidence: Bit-width and loss results are reported; no frozen same-byte full-file comparison was found.
comparison_limitations: Orthogonality-based Q/L coordination is not a first claim; isolate frozen compensation from downstream LoRA before direct comparison.
